heaven_king_ev_001.title: Wave of Reflection
heaven_king_ev_001.body: A soft calm moves across the heavens. Even the most restless angels calm down.

heaven_king_ev_002.title: Great Morning Choir
heaven_king_ev_002.body: The faithful sing with so much enthusiasm that even the heavenly columns vibrate a little.

heaven_king_ev_003.title: Day of Questions
heaven_king_ev_003.body: Mortals doubt, hesitate, and think a lot. They move forward without certainty.

heaven_king_ev_004.title: Well-Placed Little Miracles
heaven_king_ev_004.body: A few helpful boosts arrive at the right time, discreetly and usefully.

heaven_king_ev_005.title: Silence in the Chapels
heaven_king_ev_005.body: A passing weariness affects the faithful. Their fervor is dropping slightly.

heaven_king_ev_006.title: Surge of Awareness
heaven_king_ev_006.body: Mortals decide to think for themselves with almost insolent energy. Annoying, but noble.

heaven_king_ev_007.title: Drop in Fervor
heaven_king_ev_007.body: The great rites attract slightly fewer people. The candles remain dignified, at least.

heaven_king_ev_008.title: Policy of Non-Interference
heaven_king_ev_008.body: The kingdom decides to let the world breathe. Very wise. Very frustrating for nervous angels.

heaven_king_ev_009.title: Flash of Independence
heaven_king_ev_009.body: Down there, brave choices are made without glowing signs or voices in the sky. What audacity.

heaven_king_ev_010.title: Luminous Procession
heaven_king_ev_010.body: The songs rise, the steps align, and everyone looks as if they know exactly where to go.

heaven_king_ev_011.title: Backlog of Miracles
heaven_king_ev_011.body: A few requests are still pending. The situation is starting to cause concern.

heaven_king_ev_012.title: Rain of Favorable Signs
heaven_king_ev_012.body: Happy coincidences are multiplying. Many see them as favorable signs.

heaven_king_ev_013.title: Night Without an Answer
heaven_king_ev_013.body: Calls from the heart grow fewer. The silence is not cruel. It is just a little empty.

heaven_king_ev_014.title: Festival of United Voices
heaven_king_ev_014.body: The faithful are gathering in large numbers, and the singing is growing stronger.

heaven_king_ev_015.title: Dawn of Reflection
heaven_king_ev_015.body: A softness rises from the Earth. For once, even the heavenly administration finds it beautiful without adding anything.

heaven_king_ev_016.title: Overly Curious Minds
heaven_king_ev_016.body: Many wonder whether they really have to follow the marked path. Spoiler, not necessarily.

heaven_king_ev_017.title: A Sign at the Right Time
heaven_king_ev_017.body: A well-placed little push prevents a great disaster. Clean. Discreet. Satisfying.

heaven_king_ev_018.title: Distracted Faithful
heaven_king_ev_018.body: Eyes wander, songs weaken, and someone is clearly checking something else during the service.

heaven_king_ev_019.title: Brave Choices
heaven_king_ev_019.body: Mortals are making brave decisions despite their doubts. Heaven respects this momentum.

heaven_king_ev_020.title: Weary Whispers
heaven_king_ev_020.body: Prayers are still coming in, but they are less sincere and less strong.

heaven_king_ev_021.title: Respectful Observation
heaven_king_ev_021.body: Heaven chooses not to intervene. This restraint is wise, but frustrating for some angels.

heaven_king_ev_022.title: Liturgical Renewal
heaven_king_ev_022.body: The rites recover their shine. Even the old censers stand a little straighter.

heaven_king_ev_023.title: Folded Hands
heaven_king_ev_023.body: Sincere calls rise warmly. It is simple, humble, and very effective.

heaven_king_ev_024.title: Wave of Autonomy
heaven_king_ev_024.body: Mortals want to decide alone. Heaven hesitates between admiration and a small nervous twitch.

heaven_king_ev_025.title: Half-Empty Temple
heaven_king_ev_025.body: Places of worship are becoming a little emptier. It is not serious, but the decline is visible.

heaven_king_ev_026.title: Great Inner Awakening
heaven_king_ev_026.body: Consciences brighten, decisions steady themselves, and destiny has to share the stage.

heaven_king_ev_027.title: Choir of Sincere Hearts
heaven_king_ev_027.body: Prayers rise without decoration, without posture, just true. Heaven loves it when it stays simple.

heaven_king_ev_028.title: Heavenly Pause
heaven_king_ev_028.body: Interventions become rarer for a while. Heaven chooses to leave more room for autonomy.

heaven_king_ev_029.title: A Rite Slightly Too Long
heaven_king_ev_029.body: The ceremony goes on for too long and attention begins to drop.

heaven_king_ev_030.title: Free Momentum
heaven_king_ev_030.body: The world is moving forward on its own in an impressive way. For heaven, it is both beautiful and frustrating.
